rounds.title: Final Row
Weave in ends
rounds.sourceText: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.

statements.sourceText: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.

operation.instruction: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.

rounds.title: Round 1

statements.sourceText: With off white, place one sc evenly around the entire blanket.

*Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge.

note.sourceText: *Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge.
note.message: Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge.

statements.sourceText: Join with sl st to the first sc you made.

operation.target: to the first sc you made

rounds.sourceText: With off white, place one sc evenly around the entire blanket. Place 3 sc in each corner. *Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge. Join with sl st to the first sc you made.
Finish off white, add teal.
rounds.title: Finish off white, add teal.

operation.instruction: in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner

statements.sourceText: 1 hdc in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner
Join with a sl st to the first hdc

rounds.sourceText: Ch 2, 1 hdc in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first hdc. Finish off teal, add light blue.
rounds.title: Round 2

statements.sourceText: Join with a sl st to the first sc

rounds.sourceText: Ch 1, 1 sc in each st around, place 3 sc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first sc. Finish off. Weave in ends.
rounds.title: Round 3
